security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1421 http://localhost:1420; object-src 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Subversa é um cliente Subversion de desktop com design moderno, no estilo do TortoiseSVN: status, commit, branches, merge (sync/reintegrate), histórico, diff e resolução de conflitos.
